name: Apartment Lobby
description: Premium residential lobby for brand awareness and awareness campaigns
briefInstructions: Commission premium residential interior background artwork. The environment is a modern Indian apartment complex lobby: marble or granite floor, clean reception desk, tasteful indoor plants, warm lighting from pendant fixtures, elevator doors in background, high ceiling. One or two residents walking through naturally, or a committee member at the reception desk in natural conversation. The atmosphere communicates: premium, organized, modern, well-managed. NO software, NO screens, NO digital interfaces. The image should feel like a luxury real estate advertisement background. Top-left and bottom 30% must be dark and uncluttered for logo and text overlay.

inputs.label: Supporting Message
inputs.placeholder: e.g. SocietyBee brings order to every residential community
suggestions: SocietyBee brings order to every residential community
From billing to bye-laws — everything in one place
Trusted by housing societies across India
